metadata.name: Traefik Addons
metadata.description: Companion Docker Compose stack for the main Traefik template, with a docker-socket-proxy, a whoami test app, and file-provider middleware examples for hardening and external auth.

items.name: restart_policy
items.title: Restart Policy
items.description: Policy used for container restart.

items.name: traefik_network
items.title: Traefik Network
items.description: Shared Docker network used by the main Traefik stack.

items.name: traefik_network_external
items.title: External Network
items.description: Use an existing external Docker network for Traefik integration.

items.name: traefik_entrypoint
items.title: Entrypoint
items.description: Entrypoint name used for the optional whoami test route.

items.name: traefik_tls_entrypoint
items.title: TLS Entrypoint
items.description: Entrypoint name used for the HTTPS whoami route.

items.name: socket_proxy_enabled
items.title: Docker Socket Proxy
items.description: Run a restricted Docker socket proxy for Traefik and companion tooling.

items.name: socket_proxy_service_name
items.title: Socket Proxy Service Name
items.description: Compose service name for the docker-socket-proxy.

items.name: socket_proxy_container_name
items.title: Socket Proxy Container Name
items.description: Container name for the docker-socket-proxy service.

items.name: whoami_enabled
items.title: Whoami Test App
items.description: Deploy a small Traefik-routed test application.

items.name: whoami_service_name
items.title: Whoami Service Name
items.description: Compose service name for the whoami test container.

items.name: whoami_host
items.title: Whoami Host
items.description: Hostname used for the whoami test route.

items.name: whoami_domain
items.title: Whoami Domain
items.description: Domain used for the whoami test route.

items.name: whoami_tls_enabled
items.title: Whoami TLS
items.description: Create an HTTPS router for the whoami test route.

items.name: whoami_tls_certresolver
items.title: Whoami Cert Resolver
items.description: Traefik certificate resolver used for the HTTPS whoami router.

items.name: whoami_chain_middleware
items.title: Whoami Chain Middleware
items.description: File-provider middleware chain attached to the whoami routers.

items.name: security_headers_enabled
items.title: Security Headers
items.description: Render a reusable security-headers middleware.

items.name: dashboard_basicauth_enabled
items.title: Dashboard BasicAuth
items.description: Render a BasicAuth middleware suitable for dashboard protection.

items.name: dashboard_basicauth_users
items.title: BasicAuth Users
items.description: One htpasswd entry to render into the dashboard BasicAuth middleware.

items.name: ipallowlist_enabled
items.title: IP Allowlist
items.description: Render IP allowlist middlewares for restricted dashboards or internal apps.

items.name: ipallowlist_range_1
items.title: Allowlist Range 1
items.description: Primary CIDR allowed through the IP allowlist middleware.

items.name: ipallowlist_range_2
items.title: Allowlist Range 2
items.description: Optional second CIDR allowed through the IP allowlist middleware.

items.name: ipallowlist_range_3
items.title: Allowlist Range 3
items.description: Optional third CIDR allowed through the IP allowlist middleware.

items.name: forwardauth_enabled
items.title: ForwardAuth
items.description: Render a ForwardAuth middleware for Authentik, Authelia, or another auth proxy.

items.name: forwardauth_address
items.title: ForwardAuth Address
items.description: ForwardAuth endpoint Traefik should call for authentication.

items.name: forwardauth_trust_forward_header
items.title: Trust Forwarded Headers
items.description: Trust existing forwarded headers when calling the ForwardAuth endpoint.

items.name: forwardauth_response_headers_regex
items.title: Auth Response Headers Regex
items.description: Regex of headers copied back from the auth response.

items.name: crowdsec_middleware_enabled
items.title: CrowdSec Middleware
items.description: Render the Traefik CrowdSec plugin middleware example.

items.name: crowdsec_lapi_host
items.title: CrowdSec LAPI Host
items.description: CrowdSec Local API host and port reachable from Traefik.

items.name: crowdsec_bouncer_key
items.title: CrowdSec Bouncer Key
items.description: API key for the Traefik CrowdSec remediation component.

items.name: crowdsec_mode
items.title: CrowdSec Mode
items.description: CrowdSec plugin mode used by Traefik.

items.name: crowdsec_appsec_enabled
items.title: CrowdSec AppSec
items.description: Enable AppSec requests from the Traefik middleware to CrowdSec.

items.name: crowdsec_appsec_host
items.title: CrowdSec AppSec Host
items.description: CrowdSec AppSec host and port reachable from Traefik.

items.name: crowdsec_appsec_failure_block
items.title: Block On AppSec Failure
items.description: Block requests if CrowdSec AppSec returns an internal error.

items.name: crowdsec_appsec_unreachable_block
items.title: Block When AppSec Unreachable
items.description: Block requests if CrowdSec AppSec cannot be reached.

items.name: crowdsec_trusted_ip_1
items.title: Trusted IP 1
items.description: Optional trusted upstream CIDR for forwarded headers.

items.name: crowdsec_trusted_ip_2
items.title: Trusted IP 2
items.description: Optional second trusted CIDR for forwarded headers.

items.name: crowdsec_trusted_ip_3
items.title: Trusted IP 3
items.description: Optional third trusted CIDR for forwarded headers.
